description: Welcome to this bright and spacious end-unit townhome offering 1,492 sq ft of well-designed living space in a convenient Richmond location. This 3-bedroom home features a functional layout ideal for families or professionals, with generous room sizes, air conditioning/ built in vacuum and excellent natural light throughout. Enjoy the added privacy of an end unit, plus a private patio perfect for outdoor relaxation or entertaining. A one-car garage provides secure parking and extra storage. Located along No. 4 Road with easy access to shopping, schools, parks, and transit, this townhome offers comfort, space, and everyday convenience in a central Richmond setting.
